# Script Master Labs — GHOST

> GHOST is the ephemeral execution layer for autonomous AI agents: scoped,
> short-lived credentials with Ed25519-signed, tamper-evident residue. It is the
> execution-safety layer beneath the x402 agentic web (NEXUS-402, 402Proof, XAH
> Portal) and SqueezeOS signals.

## Product
- [GHOST product page](https://scriptmasterlabs.com/stack/ghost): overview, architecture, quickstart
- [GitHub repo](https://github.com/timwal78/ghost-layer): source, examples, tests
- [Architecture](https://github.com/timwal78/ghost-layer/blob/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md)

## Install
- `pip install ghost-layer`
- CLI: `ghost spawn | possess | act | evaporate | replay`

## Ecosystem
- [Stack catalog](https://scriptmasterlabs.com/stack)
- [NEXUS-402](https://nexus-402.com)
- [SqueezeOS](https://scriptmasterlabs.com)
